APB

Data come from the website of the Ministry of Public Works of Spain (www.fomento.es) in paragraph Statistical Information / Bulletin On-line / Shipping / 1.8 Port traffic in the port of Barcelona and correspond to the millions of tones from the port traffic in Barcelona.

https://apps.fomento.gob.es/BoletinOnline/?nivel=2&orden=04000000

ARIMA Model

serie=window(ts(read.table("apb2025.dat")[,1]/1000,start=1997,freq=12),start=1997)
print(round(serie,0))
##       Jan  Feb  Mar  Apr  May  Jun  Jul  Aug  Sep  Oct  Nov  Dec
## 1997 2151 1979 2241 2280 2184 2185 2297 1930 1895 2118 2169 2058
## 1998 1868 2020 2261 2068 2123 2197 2614 1762 2027 2120 2173 2106
## 1999 2055 2250 2623 2356 2461 2394 2540 2154 2187 2480 2520 2490
## 2000 2505 2357 2496 2337 2690 2731 2514 2390 2465 2499 2609 2568
## 2001 2508 2439 2821 2780 2688 2871 2855 2528 2520 2668 2574 2610
## 2002 2728 2547 2615 2666 2975 2807 3021 2836 2580 2968 2584 2672
## 2003 2634 2637 2946 2649 3273 2853 3211 2868 3035 3107 3251 3049
## 2004 3008 2843 3291 3318 3430 3534 3864 3214 3351 3299 3524 3522
## 2005 3474 3342 3849 3928 3957 3740 4082 3605 3773 3578 3839 3871
## 2006 3633 3609 4076 3870 4028 4145 4145 3988 3889 4038 4152 4084
## 2007 4141 3934 4309 4102 4512 4146 4675 4195 4251 4584 4359 4182
## 2008 4413 3983 4367 4582 5047 4816 4741 4449 3863 4345 3706 3496
## 2009 3393 3239 3375 3475 3719 3430 4058 3792 3496 3658 3602 3743
## 2010 3379 3262 3576 3431 3587 3760 4053 3675 3770 3938 3796 3761
## 2011 3872 3859 3632 3557 3974 3812 3967 3781 3584 3429 3629 3195
## 2012 3286 3361 3449 3640 3726 3977 3750 3624 3618 3532 3309 3300
## 2013 3359 2906 3559 3471 3859 3929 4036 3749 3744 3449 3271 3103
## 2014 3464 3569 3748 3772 3963 4033 4607 3941 3896 4305 3749 3300
## 2015 3539 3134 3926 4166 4478 4171 4059 3509 4187 3806 4021 4053
## 2016 3460 3410 4306 4067 4553 4528 4752 4092 4016 4028 3577 3863
## 2017 3657 5071 5219 4360 5466 4902 5961 5551 5278 5463 5342 5097
## 2018 5626 5118 5818 5372 6204 5773 6644 5366 5165 5700 5307 5662
## 2019 5240 5529 5426 6032 6469 5807 6141 5660 5659 5613 5127 4990
## 2020 5407 4750 4975 4437 4204 4300 5001 4723 4692 5356 5678 5975
## 2021 5251 5200 5709 5755 5411 5387 5843 5825 5584 5225 5626 5593
## 2022 5711 5590 6640 5952 6644 5804 6364 5981 5357 5501 5354 6006
## 2023 5104 4903 5578 5485 5990 5394 5434 4923 5020 5410 5697 5087
## 2024 5049 5518 6277 5984 6454 6548 6135 5696 5521 5905 5496 5120
## 2025 4831 5310 6466 5957 6201 5947 6292 5966 5489 6434 5666 5664
plot(serie,main="Millions of Tons of Port Cargo Traffic at the Port of Barcelona",ylim=c(1500,6600))
abline(v=1996:2026,col=4,lty=3)

#text(1990:2017+0.5,3950,1990:2017,cex=0.8)
m=apply(matrix(serie[1:(21*12)],nr=12),2,mean)
v=apply(matrix(serie[1:(21*12)],nr=12),2,var)
plot(m,v,xlab="Yearly means",ylab="Yearly variances",main="APB")
abline(lm(v~m),col=2,lty=3,lwd=2)

boxplot(serie~floor(time(serie)))

lnserie=log(serie)
plot(lnserie)

boxplot(lnserie~floor(time(lnserie)))

plot(decompose(lnserie))

monthplot(lnserie)

ts.plot(matrix(lnserie,nrow=12),col=1:8)

d12lnserie=diff(lnserie,12)
plot(d12lnserie)
abline(h=0)

d1d12lnserie=diff(d12lnserie,1)
plot(d1d12lnserie)
abline(h=0)

d1d1d12lnserie=diff(d1d12lnserie,1)
plot(d1d1d12lnserie)
abline(h=0)

var(lnserie)
## [1] 0.0998399
var(d12lnserie)
## [1] 0.01354896
var(d1d12lnserie)
## [1] 0.009711488
var(d1d1d12lnserie)
## [1] 0.02719054
par(mfrow=c(1,2))
acf(d1d12lnserie,ylim=c(-1,1),col=c(2,rep(1,11)),lwd=2,lag.max=72)
pacf(d1d12lnserie,ylim=c(-1,1),col=c(rep(1,11),2),lwd=2,lag.max=72)

par(mfrow=c(1,1))
(mod1=arima(d1d12lnserie,order=c(0,0,1),seasonal=list(order=c(0,0,1),period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = d1d12lnserie, order = c(0, 0, 1), seasonal = list(order = c(0, 0, 
##     1), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1     sma1  intercept
##       -0.4725  -0.9542     -1e-04
## s.e.   0.0528   0.0718      2e-04
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004304:  log likelihood = 423.04,  aic = -838.09
(mod1=arima(lnserie,order=c(0,1,1),seasonal=list(order=c(0,1,1),period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie, order = c(0, 1, 1), seasonal = list(order = c(0, 1, 1), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1     sma1
##       -0.4719  -0.9526
## s.e.   0.0527   0.0700
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004309:  log likelihood = 423,  aic = -839.99
#################Validation#################################
validation=function(model){
  s=frequency(get(model$series))
  resid=model$residuals
  par(mfrow=c(2,2),mar=c(3,3,3,3))
  #Residuals plot
  plot(resid,main="Residuals")
  abline(h=0)
  abline(h=c(-3*sd(resid),3*sd(resid)),lty=3,col=4)
  #Square Root of absolute values of residuals (Homocedasticity)
  scatter.smooth(sqrt(abs(resid)),main="Square Root of Absolute residuals",
                 lpars=list(col=2))
  
  #Normal plot of residuals
  qqnorm(resid)
  qqline(resid,col=2,lwd=2)
  
  ##Histogram of residuals with normal curve
  hist(resid,breaks=20,freq=FALSE)
  curve(dnorm(x,mean=mean(resid),sd=sd(resid)),col=2,add=T)
  
  
  #ACF & PACF of residuals
  par(mfrow=c(1,2))
  acf(resid,ylim=c(-1,1),lag.max=60,col=c(2,rep(1,s-1)),lwd=1)
  pacf(resid,ylim=c(-1,1),lag.max=60,col=c(rep(1,s-1),2),lwd=1)
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
  
  #ACF & PACF of square residuals 
  par(mfrow=c(1,2))
  acf(resid^2,ylim=c(-1,1),lag.max=60,col=c(2,rep(1,s-1)),lwd=1)
  pacf(resid^2,ylim=c(-1,1),lag.max=60,col=c(rep(1,s-1),2),lwd=1)
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
  
  #Ljung-Box p-values
  par(mar=c(2,2,1,1))
  tsdiag(model,gof.lag=7*s)
  cat("\n--------------------------------------------------------------------\n")
  print(model)
  
  #Stationary and Invertible
  cat("\nModul of AR Characteristic polynomial Roots: ", 
      Mod(polyroot(c(1,-model$model$phi))),"\n")
  cat("\nModul of MA Characteristic polynomial Roots: ",
      Mod(polyroot(c(1,model$model$theta))),"\n")
  
  #Model expressed as an MA infinity (psi-weights)
  psis=ARMAtoMA(ar=model$model$phi,ma=model$model$theta,lag.max=36)
  names(psis)=paste("psi",1:36)
  cat("\nPsi-weights (MA(inf))\n")
  cat("\n--------------------\n")
  print(psis[1:20])
  
  #Model expressed as an AR infinity (pi-weights)
  pis=-ARMAtoMA(ar=-model$model$theta,ma=-model$model$phi,lag.max=36)
  names(pis)=paste("pi",1:36)
  cat("\nPi-weights (AR(inf))\n")
  cat("\n--------------------\n")
  print(pis[1:20])
 
  cat("\nNormality Tests\n")
  cat("\n--------------------\n")
 
  ##Shapiro-Wilks Normality test
  print(shapiro.test(resid(model)))

  suppressMessages(require(nortest,quietly=TRUE,warn.conflicts=FALSE))
  ##Anderson-Darling test
  print(ad.test(resid(model)))
  
  suppressMessages(require(tseries,quietly=TRUE,warn.conflicts=FALSE))
  ##Jarque-Bera test
  print(jarque.bera.test(resid(model)))
  
  cat("\nHomoscedasticity Test\n")
  cat("\n--------------------\n")
  suppressMessages(require(lmtest,quietly=TRUE,warn.conflicts=FALSE))
  ##Breusch-Pagan test
  obs=get(model$series)
  print(bptest(resid(model)~I(obs-resid(model))))
  
  cat("\nIndependence Tests\n")
  cat("\n--------------------\n")
  
  ##Ljung-Box test
  cat("\nLjung-Box test\n")
  print(t(apply(matrix(c(1:4,(1:4)*s)),1,function(el) {
    te=Box.test(resid(model),type="Ljung-Box",lag=el)
    c(lag=(te$parameter),statistic=te$statistic[[1]],p.value=te$p.value)})))

}
################# Fi Validaci? #################################
validation(mod1)

## 
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie, order = c(0, 1, 1), seasonal = list(order = c(0, 1, 1), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1     sma1
##       -0.4719  -0.9526
## s.e.   0.0527   0.0700
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004309:  log likelihood = 423,  aic = -839.99
## 
## Modul of AR Characteristic polynomial Roots:   
## 
## Modul of MA Characteristic polynomial Roots:  1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 1.004055 2.119075 
## 
## Psi-weights (MA(inf))
## 
## --------------------
##      psi 1      psi 2      psi 3      psi 4      psi 5      psi 6      psi 7 
## -0.4719039  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
##      psi 8      psi 9     psi 10     psi 11     psi 12     psi 13     psi 14 
##  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 -0.9525938  0.4495327  0.0000000 
##     psi 15     psi 16     psi 17     psi 18     psi 19     psi 20 
##  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
## 
## Pi-weights (AR(inf))
## 
## --------------------
##          pi 1          pi 2          pi 3          pi 4          pi 5 
## -0.4719039397 -0.2226933283 -0.1050898590 -0.0495923185 -0.0234028105 
##          pi 6          pi 7          pi 8          pi 9         pi 10 
## -0.0110438785 -0.0052116498 -0.0024593981 -0.0011605996 -0.0005476915 
##         pi 11         pi 12         pi 13         pi 14         pi 15 
## -0.0002584578 -0.9527157174 -0.4495903005 -0.2121634341 -0.1001207604 
##         pi 16         pi 17         pi 18         pi 19         pi 20 
## -0.0472473813 -0.0222962254 -0.0105216766 -0.0049652206 -0.0023431072 
## 
## Normality Tests
## 
## --------------------
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## W = 0.98311, p-value = 0.0004198
## 
## 
##  Anderson-Darling normality test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## A = 0.2901, p-value = 0.6102
## 
## 
##  Jarque Bera Test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## X-squared = 48.369, df = 2, p-value = 3.139e-11
## 
## 
## Homoscedasticity Test
## 
## --------------------
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  resid(model) ~ I(obs - resid(model))
## BP = 1.6407, df = 1, p-value = 0.2002
## 
## 
## Independence Tests
## 
## --------------------
## 
## Ljung-Box test
##      lag.df  statistic   p.value
## [1,]      1  0.2499621 0.6171018
## [2,]      2  0.4804174 0.7864637
## [3,]      3  0.6053680 0.8952024
## [4,]      4  0.9368950 0.9192090
## [5,]     12 11.7958765 0.4622093
## [6,]     24 25.6177667 0.3728400
## [7,]     36 39.5904143 0.3128199
## [8,]     48 53.1992683 0.2809130
ultim=c(2024,12)
pdq=c(0,1,1)
PDQ=c(0,1,1)

serie1=window(serie,end=ultim+c(1,0))
lnserie1=log(serie1)
serie2=window(serie,end=ultim)
lnserie2=log(serie2)

(mod1A=arima(lnserie1,order=pdq,seasonal=list(order=PDQ,period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie1, order = pdq, seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1     sma1
##       -0.4719  -0.9526
## s.e.   0.0527   0.0700
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004309:  log likelihood = 423,  aic = -839.99
(mod1B=arima(lnserie2,order=pdq,seasonal=list(order=PDQ,period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie2, order = pdq, seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1     sma1
##       -0.4637  -0.9992
## s.e.   0.0534   0.1389
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004162:  log likelihood = 407.02,  aic = -808.05
pred=predict(mod1B,n.ahead=12)
pr<-ts(c(tail(lnserie2,1),pred$pred),start=ultim,freq=12)

se<-ts(c(0,pred$se),start=ultim,freq=12)

#Intervals
tl<-ts(exp(pr-1.96*se),start=ultim,freq=12)
tu<-ts(exp(pr+1.96*se),start=ultim,freq=12)
pr<-ts(exp(pr),start=ultim,freq=12)


ts.plot(serie,tl,tu,pr,lty=c(1,2,2,1),col=c(1,4,4,2),xlim=ultim[1]+c(-3,+2),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(0,1,1)(0,1,1)12")
abline(v=(ultim[1]-3):(ultim[1]+2),lty=3,col=4)

(previs=window(cbind(tl,pr,tu,serie,error=round(serie-pr,3)),start=ultim))
##                tl       pr       tu    serie    error
## Dec 2024 5120.285 5120.285 5120.285 5120.285    0.000
## Jan 2025 4604.870 5237.327 5956.649 4831.427 -405.900
## Feb 2025 4451.128 5150.947 5960.793 5309.825  158.878
## Mar 2025 4850.541 5700.712 6699.897 6466.109  765.397
## Apr 2025 4647.563 5539.826 6603.390 5957.020  417.194
## May 2025 4911.446 5931.363 7163.077 6201.186  269.823
## Jun 2025 4717.975 5767.755 7051.118 5947.155  179.400
## Jul 2025 4961.411 6135.610 7587.702 6292.087  156.477
## Aug 2025 4403.351 5505.283 6882.972 5966.330  461.047
## Sep 2025 4332.223 5473.052 6914.301 5488.668   15.616
## Oct 2025 4442.606 5668.731 7233.258 6433.878  765.147
## Nov 2025 4325.160 5571.978 7178.217 5666.375   94.397
## Dec 2025 4214.416 5479.640 7124.702 5664.101  184.461
obs=window(serie,start=ultim)

mod.RMSE1=sqrt(sum((obs-pr)^2)/12)
mod.MAE1=sum(abs(obs-pr))/12
mod.RMSPE1=sqrt(sum(((obs-pr)/obs)^2)/12)
mod.MAPE1=sum(abs(obs-pr)/obs)/12

data.frame("RMSE"=mod.RMSE1,"MAE"=mod.MAE1,"RMSPE"=mod.RMSPE1,"MAPE"=mod.MAPE1)
##       RMSE      MAE      RMSPE       MAPE
## 1 400.0571 322.8114 0.06567095 0.05409626
mCI1=mean(tu-tl)

cat("\nMean Length CI: ",mCI1)
## 
## Mean Length CI:  2114.876
pred=predict(mod1A,n.ahead=12)
pr<-ts(c(tail(lnserie,1),pred$pred),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
se<-ts(c(0,pred$se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)

#Intervals
tl1<-ts(exp(pr-1.96*se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
tu1<-ts(exp(pr+1.96*se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
pr1<-ts(exp(pr),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)

ts.plot(serie,tl1,tu1,pr1,lty=c(1,2,2,1),col=c(1,4,4,2),xlim=c(ultim[1]-2,ultim[1]+3),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(0,1,1)(0,1,1)12")
abline(v=(ultim[1]-2):(ultim[1]+3),lty=3,col=4)

modA=mod1A
(previs1=window(cbind(tl1,pr1,tu1),start=ultim+c(1,0)))
##               tl1      pr1      tu1
## Dec 2025 5664.101 5664.101 5664.101
## Jan 2026 4919.216 5596.953 6368.064
## Feb 2026 4797.976 5551.967 6424.446
## Mar 2026 5260.589 6180.047 7260.209
## Apr 2026 5021.075 5980.765 7123.883
## May 2026 5303.160 6398.182 7719.310
## Jun 2026 5073.704 6195.166 7564.509
## Jul 2026 5332.793 6585.567 8132.641
## Aug 2026 4771.340 5955.789 7434.270
## Sep 2026 4661.381 5878.395 7413.153
## Oct 2026 4807.058 6121.822 7796.183
## Nov 2026 4648.449 5975.862 7682.332
## Dec 2026 4537.782 5886.800 7636.862
(mod2=arima(d1d12lnserie,order=c(2,0,0),seasonal=list(order=c(0,0,1),period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = d1d12lnserie, order = c(2, 0, 0), seasonal = list(order = c(0, 0, 
##     1), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ar1      ar2     sma1  intercept
##       -0.4241  -0.1836  -0.9521     -1e-04
## s.e.   0.0540   0.0538   0.0682      3e-04
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004359:  log likelihood = 421.15,  aic = -832.31
(mod2=arima(lnserie,order=c(2,1,0),seasonal=list(order=c(0,1,1),period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie, order = c(2, 1, 0), seasonal = list(order = c(0, 1, 1), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1      ar2     sma1
##       -0.424  -0.1835  -0.9511
## s.e.   0.054   0.0538   0.0672
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004362:  log likelihood = 421.13,  aic = -834.25
validation(mod2)

## 
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie, order = c(2, 1, 0), seasonal = list(order = c(0, 1, 1), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1      ar2     sma1
##       -0.424  -0.1835  -0.9511
## s.e.   0.054   0.0538   0.0672
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004362:  log likelihood = 421.13,  aic = -834.25
## 
## Modul of AR Characteristic polynomial Roots:  2.33447 2.33447 
## 
## Modul of MA Characteristic polynomial Roots:  1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 
## 
## Psi-weights (MA(inf))
## 
## --------------------
##         psi 1         psi 2         psi 3         psi 4         psi 5 
## -4.239566e-01 -3.755519e-03  7.938597e-02 -3.296708e-02 -5.902915e-04 
##         psi 6         psi 7         psi 8         psi 9        psi 10 
##  6.299543e-03 -2.562418e-03 -6.957907e-05  4.996886e-04 -1.990789e-04 
##        psi 11        psi 12        psi 13        psi 14        psi 15 
## -7.289409e-06 -9.510296e-01  4.031966e-01  3.571043e-03 -7.549841e-02 
##        psi 16        psi 17        psi 18        psi 19        psi 20 
##  3.135278e-02  5.613407e-04 -5.991053e-03  2.436943e-03  6.616833e-05 
## 
## Pi-weights (AR(inf))
## 
## --------------------
##       pi 1       pi 2       pi 3       pi 4       pi 5       pi 6       pi 7 
## -0.4239566 -0.1834947  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
##       pi 8       pi 9      pi 10      pi 11      pi 12      pi 13      pi 14 
##  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 -0.9510693 -0.4032121 -0.1745162 
##      pi 15      pi 16      pi 17      pi 18      pi 19      pi 20 
##  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
## 
## Normality Tests
## 
## --------------------
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## W = 0.981, p-value = 0.0001488
## 
## 
##  Anderson-Darling normality test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## A = 0.27461, p-value = 0.6604
## 
## 
##  Jarque Bera Test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## X-squared = 60.289, df = 2, p-value = 8.105e-14
## 
## 
## Homoscedasticity Test
## 
## --------------------
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  resid(model) ~ I(obs - resid(model))
## BP = 1.3698, df = 1, p-value = 0.2418
## 
## 
## Independence Tests
## 
## --------------------
## 
## Ljung-Box test
##      lag.df   statistic   p.value
## [1,]      1  0.05580809 0.8132485
## [2,]      2  0.57661462 0.7495312
## [3,]      3  3.59978913 0.3080486
## [4,]      4  3.84677295 0.4271399
## [5,]     12 13.65418950 0.3233339
## [6,]     24 26.72983677 0.3172028
## [7,]     36 42.47496005 0.2120979
## [8,]     48 57.04633301 0.1741140
ultim=c(2024,12)
pdq=c(2,1,0)
PDQ=c(0,1,1)

serie1=window(serie,end=ultim+c(1,0))
lnserie1=log(serie1)
serie2=window(serie,end=ultim)
lnserie2=log(serie2)

(mod2A=arima(lnserie1,order=pdq,seasonal=list(order=PDQ,period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie1, order = pdq, seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1      ar2     sma1
##       -0.424  -0.1835  -0.9511
## s.e.   0.054   0.0538   0.0672
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004362:  log likelihood = 421.13,  aic = -834.25
(mod2B=arima(lnserie2,order=pdq,seasonal=list(order=PDQ,period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie2, order = pdq, seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ar1      ar2     sma1
##       -0.4231  -0.1861  -0.9999
## s.e.   0.0548   0.0547   0.1307
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004193:  log likelihood = 405.72,  aic = -803.45
pred=predict(mod2B,n.ahead=12)
pr<-ts(c(tail(lnserie2,1),pred$pred),start=ultim,freq=12)

se<-ts(c(0,pred$se),start=ultim,freq=12)

#Intervals
tl<-ts(exp(pr-1.96*se),start=ultim,freq=12)
tu<-ts(exp(pr+1.96*se),start=ultim,freq=12)
pr<-ts(exp(pr),start=ultim,freq=12)


ts.plot(serie,tl,tu,pr,lty=c(1,2,2,1),col=c(1,4,4,2),xlim=ultim[1]+c(-3,+2),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(2,1,0)(0,1,1)12")
abline(v=(ultim[1]-3):(ultim[1]+2),lty=3,col=4)

(previs=window(cbind(tl,pr,tu,serie,error=round(serie-pr,3)),start=ultim))
##                tl       pr       tu    serie    error
## Dec 2024 5120.285 5120.285 5120.285 5120.285    0.000
## Jan 2025 4592.286 5225.776 5946.655 4831.427 -394.349
## Feb 2025 4409.524 5118.889 5942.371 5309.825  190.936
## Mar 2025 4774.759 5638.868 6659.358 6466.109  827.241
## Apr 2025 4560.190 5494.680 6620.668 5957.020  462.340
## May 2025 4801.765 5881.344 7203.644 6201.186  319.842
## Jun 2025 4597.555 5716.918 7108.813 5947.155  230.237
## Jul 2025 4821.828 6082.881 7673.736 6292.087  209.206
## Aug 2025 4268.446 5457.769 6978.476 5966.330  508.561
## Sep 2025 4189.559 5425.692 7026.547 5488.668   62.976
## Oct 2025 4287.175 5620.153 7367.584 6433.878  813.725
## Nov 2025 4164.408 5523.160 7325.241 5666.375  143.215
## Dec 2025 4050.172 5432.061 7285.440 5664.101  232.040
obs=window(serie,start=ultim)

mod.RMSE2=sqrt(sum((obs-pr)^2)/12)
mod.MAE2=sum(abs(obs-pr))/12
mod.RMSPE2=sqrt(sum(((obs-pr)/obs)^2)/12)
mod.MAPE2=sum(abs(obs-pr)/obs)/12

data.frame("RMSE"=mod.RMSE2,"MAE"=mod.MAE2,"RMSPE"=mod.RMSPE2,"MAPE"=mod.MAPE2)
##      RMSE      MAE      RMSPE       MAPE
## 1 436.676 366.2224 0.07148485 0.06134145
mCI2=mean(tu-tl)

cat("\nMean Length CI: ",mCI2)
## 
## Mean Length CI:  2278.528
pred=predict(mod2A,n.ahead=12)
pr<-ts(c(tail(lnserie,1),pred$pred),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
se<-ts(c(0,pred$se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)

#Intervals
tl2<-ts(exp(pr-1.96*se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
tu2<-ts(exp(pr+1.96*se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
pr2<-ts(exp(pr),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)

ts.plot(serie,tl2,tu2,pr2,lty=c(1,2,2,1),col=c(1,4,4,2),xlim=c(ultim[1]-2,ultim[1]+3),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(2,1,0)(0,1,1)12")
abline(v=(ultim[1]-2):(ultim[1]+3),lty=3,col=4)

modB=mod2A
(previs2=window(cbind(tl2,pr2,tu2),start=ultim+c(1,0)))
##               tl2      pr2      tu2
## Dec 2025 5664.101 5664.101 5664.101
## Jan 2026 4948.394 5634.469 6415.666
## Feb 2026 4772.064 5543.416 6439.448
## Mar 2026 5227.012 6178.508 7303.208
## Apr 2026 4962.068 5984.881 7218.522
## May 2026 5218.123 6398.316 7845.436
## Jun 2026 4975.617 6194.523 7712.030
## Jul 2026 5213.233 6585.215 8318.266
## Aug 2026 4652.472 5957.062 7627.470
## Sep 2026 4532.301 5878.210 7623.800
## Oct 2026 4663.143 6122.501 8038.573
## Nov 2026 4497.533 5974.681 7936.978
## Dec 2026 4381.377 5886.260 7908.028
library(forecast)
auto.arima(lnserie)
## Series: lnserie 
## ARIMA(0,1,1)(2,0,0)[12] 
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1    sar1    sar2
##       -0.4896  0.3110  0.2291
## s.e.   0.0506  0.0521  0.0545
## 
## sigma^2 = 0.005164:  log likelihood = 420.96
## AIC=-833.92   AICc=-833.8   BIC=-818.52
(mod3<-arima(lnserie,order=c(0,1,1),seasonal=list(order=c(2,0,0),period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie, order = c(0, 1, 1), seasonal = list(order = c(2, 0, 0), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1    sar1    sar2
##       -0.4896  0.3110  0.2291
## s.e.   0.0506  0.0521  0.0545
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.005119:  log likelihood = 420.96,  aic = -833.92
validation(mod2)

## 
## --------------------------------------------------------------------
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie, order = c(2, 1, 0), seasonal = list(order = c(0, 1, 1), period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1      ar2     sma1
##       -0.424  -0.1835  -0.9511
## s.e.   0.054   0.0538   0.0672
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.004362:  log likelihood = 421.13,  aic = -834.25
## 
## Modul of AR Characteristic polynomial Roots:  2.33447 2.33447 
## 
## Modul of MA Characteristic polynomial Roots:  1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 1.004189 
## 
## Psi-weights (MA(inf))
## 
## --------------------
##         psi 1         psi 2         psi 3         psi 4         psi 5 
## -4.239566e-01 -3.755519e-03  7.938597e-02 -3.296708e-02 -5.902915e-04 
##         psi 6         psi 7         psi 8         psi 9        psi 10 
##  6.299543e-03 -2.562418e-03 -6.957907e-05  4.996886e-04 -1.990789e-04 
##        psi 11        psi 12        psi 13        psi 14        psi 15 
## -7.289409e-06 -9.510296e-01  4.031966e-01  3.571043e-03 -7.549841e-02 
##        psi 16        psi 17        psi 18        psi 19        psi 20 
##  3.135278e-02  5.613407e-04 -5.991053e-03  2.436943e-03  6.616833e-05 
## 
## Pi-weights (AR(inf))
## 
## --------------------
##       pi 1       pi 2       pi 3       pi 4       pi 5       pi 6       pi 7 
## -0.4239566 -0.1834947  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
##       pi 8       pi 9      pi 10      pi 11      pi 12      pi 13      pi 14 
##  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 -0.9510693 -0.4032121 -0.1745162 
##      pi 15      pi 16      pi 17      pi 18      pi 19      pi 20 
##  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000  0.0000000 
## 
## Normality Tests
## 
## --------------------
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## W = 0.981, p-value = 0.0001488
## 
## 
##  Anderson-Darling normality test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## A = 0.27461, p-value = 0.6604
## 
## 
##  Jarque Bera Test
## 
## data:  resid(model)
## X-squared = 60.289, df = 2, p-value = 8.105e-14
## 
## 
## Homoscedasticity Test
## 
## --------------------
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  resid(model) ~ I(obs - resid(model))
## BP = 1.3698, df = 1, p-value = 0.2418
## 
## 
## Independence Tests
## 
## --------------------
## 
## Ljung-Box test
##      lag.df   statistic   p.value
## [1,]      1  0.05580809 0.8132485
## [2,]      2  0.57661462 0.7495312
## [3,]      3  3.59978913 0.3080486
## [4,]      4  3.84677295 0.4271399
## [5,]     12 13.65418950 0.3233339
## [6,]     24 26.72983677 0.3172028
## [7,]     36 42.47496005 0.2120979
## [8,]     48 57.04633301 0.1741140
ultim=c(2024,12)
pdq=c(0,1,1)
PDQ=c(2,0,0)

serie1=window(serie,end=ultim+c(1,0))
lnserie1=log(serie1)
serie2=window(serie,end=ultim)
lnserie2=log(serie2)

(mod3A=arima(lnserie1,order=pdq,seasonal=list(order=PDQ,period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie1, order = pdq, seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1    sar1    sar2
##       -0.4896  0.3110  0.2291
## s.e.   0.0506  0.0521  0.0545
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.005119:  log likelihood = 420.96,  aic = -833.92
(mod3B=arima(lnserie2,order=pdq,seasonal=list(order=PDQ,period=12)))
## 
## Call:
## arima(x = lnserie2, order = pdq, seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = 12))
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ma1    sar1    sar2
##       -0.4834  0.2944  0.2286
## s.e.   0.0515  0.0531  0.0556
## 
## sigma^2 estimated as 0.005151:  log likelihood = 405.42,  aic = -802.85
pred=predict(mod3B,n.ahead=12)
pr<-ts(c(tail(lnserie2,1),pred$pred),start=ultim,freq=12)

se<-ts(c(0,pred$se),start=ultim,freq=12)

#Intervals
tl<-ts(exp(pr-1.96*se),start=ultim,freq=12)
tu<-ts(exp(pr+1.96*se),start=ultim,freq=12)
pr<-ts(exp(pr),start=ultim,freq=12)


ts.plot(serie,tl,tu,pr,lty=c(1,2,2,1),col=c(1,4,4,2),xlim=ultim[1]+c(-3,+2),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(0,1,1)(2,0,0)12")
abline(v=(ultim[1]-3):(ultim[1]+2),lty=3,col=4)

(previs=window(cbind(tl,pr,tu,serie,error=round(serie-pr,3)),start=ultim))
##                tl       pr       tu    serie    error
## Dec 2024 5120.285 5120.285 5120.285 5120.285    0.000
## Jan 2025 4483.551 5160.758 5940.251 4831.427 -329.331
## Feb 2025 4480.489 5249.113 6149.594 5309.825   60.712
## Mar 2025 4717.597 5615.353 6683.952 6466.109  850.756
## Apr 2025 4566.815 5515.532 6661.336 5957.020  441.488
## May 2025 4700.696 5754.407 7044.319 6201.186  446.779
## Jun 2025 4550.963 5642.070 6994.773 5947.155  305.085
## Jul 2025 4419.002 5544.340 6956.255 6292.087  747.747
## Aug 2025 4179.262 5303.416 6729.949 5966.330  662.914
## Sep 2025 4114.624 5278.277 6771.022 5488.668  210.391
## Oct 2025 4225.230 5476.738 7098.940 6433.878  957.140
## Nov 2025 4144.498 5425.994 7103.736 5666.375  240.381
## Dec 2025 3917.338 5178.207 6844.909 5664.101  485.894
obs=window(serie,start=ultim)

mod.RMSE3=sqrt(sum((obs-pr)^2)/12)
mod.MAE3=sum(abs(obs-pr))/12
mod.RMSPE3=sqrt(sum(((obs-pr)/obs)^2)/12)
mod.MAPE3=sum(abs(obs-pr)/obs)/12

data.frame("RMSE"=mod.RMSE3,"MAE"=mod.MAE3,"RMSPE"=mod.RMSPE3,"MAPE"=mod.MAPE3)
##      RMSE      MAE      RMSPE       MAPE
## 1 545.922 478.2181 0.08880247 0.07949015
mCI3=mean(tu-tl)

cat("\nMean Length CI: ",mCI3)
## 
## Mean Length CI:  2190.69
pred=predict(mod3A,n.ahead=12)
pr<-ts(c(tail(lnserie,1),pred$pred),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
se<-ts(c(0,pred$se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)

#Intervals
tl2<-ts(exp(pr-1.96*se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
tu2<-ts(exp(pr+1.96*se),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)
pr2<-ts(exp(pr),start=ultim+c(1,0),freq=12)

ts.plot(serie,tl2,tu2,pr2,lty=c(1,2,2,1),col=c(1,4,4,2),xlim=c(ultim[1]-2,ultim[1]+3),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(0,1,1)(2,0,0)12")
abline(v=(ultim[1]-2):(ultim[1]+3),lty=3,col=4)

modC=mod3A
(previs3=window(cbind(tl2,pr2,tu2),start=ultim+c(1,0)))
##               tl2      pr2      tu2
## Dec 2025 5664.101 5664.101 5664.101
## Jan 2026 4799.085 5521.539 6352.752
## Feb 2026 4957.587 5802.902 6792.351
## Mar 2026 5345.277 6354.455 7554.163
## Apr 2026 5081.156 6127.001 7388.110
## May 2026 5166.176 6312.401 7712.940
## Jun 2026 5053.237 6251.427 7733.723
## Jul 2026 5007.436 6267.757 7845.288
## Aug 2026 4788.705 6061.073 7671.510
## Sep 2026 4583.745 5863.651 7500.942
## Oct 2026 4841.244 6256.476 8085.421
## Nov 2026 4533.191 5916.062 7720.785
## Dec 2026 4417.693 5820.081 7667.654
par(mfrow=c(1,3),mar=c(3,3,1,1))
ts.plot(serie,previs1,lty=c(1,2,1,2),col=c(1,4,2,4),xlim=c(2023,2027),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(0,1,1)(0,1,1)12")
abline(v=2023:2027,lty=3,col=4,ylim=c(15,280))
ts.plot(serie,previs2,lty=c(1,2,1,2),col=c(1,4,2,4),xlim=c(2023,2027),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(2,1,0)(0,1,1)12")
abline(v=2023:2027,lty=3,col=4,ylim=c(15,280))
ts.plot(serie,previs3,lty=c(1,2,1,2),col=c(1,4,2,4),xlim=c(2023,2027),type="o",main="Model ARIMA(0,1,1)(2,0,0)12")
abline(v=2023:2027,lty=3,col=4,ylim=c(15,280))

par(mfrow=c(1,1))
resul=data.frame(
  par=c(length(coef(mod1)),length(coef(mod2)),length(coef(mod3))),
  SigmaZ=sqrt(c(mod1$sigma2,mod2$sigma2,mod3$sigma2)),
  AIC=c(AIC(mod1),AIC(mod2),AIC(mod3)),
  BIC=c(BIC(mod1),BIC(mod2),BIC(mod3)),
  RMSE=c(mod.RMSE1,mod.RMSE2,mod.RMSE3),
  MAE=c(mod.MAE1,mod.MAE2,mod.MAE3),
  RMSPE=c(mod.RMSPE1,mod.RMSPE2,mod.RMSPE3),
  MAPE=c(mod.MAPE1,mod.MAPE2,mod.MAPE3),
  meanLength=c(sum(previs1[,3]-previs1[,1]),sum(previs2[,3]-previs2[,1]),sum(previs3[,3]-previs3[,1]))/12)
row.names(resul)=c("ARIMA(0,1,1)(0,1,1)12","ARIMA(2,1,0)(0,1,1)12","ARIMA(0,1,1)(2,0,0)12")


resul
##                       par     SigmaZ       AIC       BIC     RMSE      MAE
## ARIMA(0,1,1)(0,1,1)12   2 0.06564438 -839.9945 -828.5521 400.0571 322.8114
## ARIMA(2,1,0)(0,1,1)12   3 0.06604661 -834.2507 -818.9942 436.6760 366.2224
## ARIMA(0,1,1)(2,0,0)12   3 0.07154668 -833.9171 -818.5198 545.9220 478.2181
##                            RMSPE       MAPE meanLength
## ARIMA(0,1,1)(0,1,1)12 0.06567095 0.05409626   2451.779
## ARIMA(2,1,0)(0,1,1)12 0.07148485 0.06134145   2695.341
## ARIMA(0,1,1)(2,0,0)12 0.08880247 0.07949015   2620.926
